topics: Design and implement a lexical analyzer using C language to recognize all valid tokens in the input program, ignoring redundant spaces, tabs, newlines, and comments

Write a program to find First and Follow of any given grammar

Construct a Shift Reduce Parser for a given language
Write a program to perform constant propagation
